message:
test(integration): add 29 tests for crash persistence recovery pipeline (ft-e34d9.10.6.6)

End-to-end integration tests validating crash-consistency and restart
recovery semantics across crash_persistence_gate, durable_state, and
session_topology modules:

- Standard invariant/scenario coverage validation (7 invariants, 7 scenarios)
- Gate evaluation: all-pass, data-loss-fail, conditional-pass verdicts
- Durable state checkpoint→rollback recovery pipeline
- Checkpoint monotonic IDs, retention limits, diff detection
- Cross-module: checkpoint→crash→rollback→gate verdict pipeline
- Report serde roundtrip and summary rendering
- Edge cases: empty scenarios, all-fail-no-data-loss, rolled-back checkpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
